comments.body: Implemented on branch feat/reconcile-continuous-loop (commit 5ef25ce1). Repo Variable RECONCILE_CONTINUOUS=true set on navapbc/rebar (PUBLIC) — inert until the workflow lands on main, then the loop self-activates. Not yet pushed / no PR opened (awaiting go-ahead). Backstop */20 schedule retained; template default unchanged for clients.

compiled_state.description:
# Opt-in continuous-loop cadence for the Jira reconcile bridge

## What
Add an opt-in self-rescheduling loop (approach B) to `.github/workflows/reconcile-bridge.yml`
so the bridge can sync more often than GitHub's 5-min `schedule` floor, WITHOUT
narrowing pass scope (we keep full passes — a watermark/incremental scan was rejected
because partial scans have caused drift in the past).

Mechanism: each run re-dispatches the next via `workflow_dispatch` (the documented
exception where the default GITHUB_TOKEN creates a new run). Gated behind a repo
Variable `RECONCILE_CONTINUOUS` (default unset/off) so the file stays a verbatim
client template — clients on private repos are unaffected. The `*/20` schedule
remains as a backstop; concurrency group + reconciler pass-lock prevent overlap/fan-out.

Enabled on this repo (navapbc/rebar, PUBLIC → free Actions) by setting the Variable.

## Files
- `.github/workflows/reconcile-bridge.yml` — `actions: write` permission + gated re-dispatch step + header note.
- `docs/jira-sync-setup.md` — new "Continuous loop" section + inputs-table row + permissions row.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Re-dispatch step is gated on `RECONCILE_CONTINUOUS == 'true'` and skipped by default (template default = current `*/20` behavior).
- [ ] Uses `workflow_dispatch` self-dispatch with the default `GITHUB_TOKEN` (no PAT); `permissions: actions: write` declared.
- [ ] `if: !cancelled()` so a failed pass re-seeds the chain but cancel is a kill switch; `*/20` schedule kept as backstop.
- [ ] Docs explain opt-in, public-repo/self-hosted-only (billing), and the kill switch.
- [ ] Full passes preserved (no incremental/watermark scan).
compiled_state.title: Opt-in continuous-loop cadence for the Jira reconcile bridge
